item.title: i love you guys and thank you for believing in me. this year, i hope i can return the favor, because i believe in you and i believe in your future. hopefully this new era will mark the beginning of a great journey for me and for my followers. i love you g

item.title: i love you guys. i wish i could give all of you a hug and let you know how much you mean to me. we still have so far to go but i am so thankful to be along for the ride with 1 million amazing people. you guys are my family, and if i had to do it all over
item.description: i love you guys. i wish i could give all of you a hug and let you know how much you mean to me. we still have so far to go but i am so thankful to be along for the ride with 1 million amazing people. you guys are my family, and if i had to do it all over
